title: Akua Package Manifest
description: Top-level schema for an Akua package (package.yaml). Placeholder — full schema lands in v4.

components.description: Components the package assembles. Each component has a type (helm-chart, knative-app, oci-registry, git-repo, raw-manifests) and a source reference.

userInputs.description: JSON Schema Draft 7 describing customer-configurable fields. Use the x-user-input and x-input extensions (see values-input.schema.json).

transforms.description: Transform plugins (Extism-compatible WASM modules) applied during build.
